# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

plugins:
  pomerium:
    enabled: true
  rate-limiting:
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 80
    path: /users

  - name: products-service
    host: products-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 80
    path: /products

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 80
    path: /orders

routes:
  - name: users-route
    protocols: 
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /users
    service: users-service
    upstream_url: http://users-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    strip_path: false

  - name: products-route
    protocols: 
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /products
    service: products-service
    upstream_url: http://products-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    strip_path: true

  - name: orders-route
    protocols: 
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /orders
    service: orders-service
    upstream_url: http://orders-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    strip_path: false

upstreams:
  users-service:
    targets:
      - target: users-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        weight: 100
      - target: users-service-backup.default.svc.cluster.local
        weight: 0

  products-service:
    targets:
      - target: products-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        weight: 100
      - target: products-service-backup.default.svc.cluster.local
        weight: 0

  orders-service:
    targets:
      - target: orders-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-service-backup.default.svc.cluster.local
        weight: 0
